channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Former Kenyan Minister Raphael Tuju Faces Legal Charges Over Disappearance Case
item.description: The legal issues facing former Kenyan Cabinet Secretary Raphael Tuju have reached a critical point as he appeared in Kibera Law Courts. Tuju is charged with providing false information regarding his w...

item.title: EFCC Arrests 31 Suspected Internet Fraudsters at Abuja Academy
item.description: On Thursday, April 9, 2026, the Economic and Financial Crimes Commission (EFCC) carried out a major operation in Becki Estate, Karu, Abuja, where dem arrest 31 people suspected to be involved in inter...

item.title: Palestinians hold funeral for Al Jazeera journalist Mohammed Wishah killed in Gaza drone strike
item.description: On April 9, 2026, Palestinians gathered in central Gaza to pay their last respects to Mohammed Wishah, a correspondent for Al Jazeera Mubasher, who was killed the previous day in an Israeli drone stri...

item.title: Tanzania economy resilience against possible oil supply disruption from Middle East conflict
item.description: This article explain how Tanzania economy can manage the current oil shock caused by the conflict between US, Israel and Iran in the Middle East. The author, Charles Makakala, say the impact will be m...

item.title: VP Sara Duterte Confirms No Official Senate Slate Yet for 2028 Elections
item.description: Vice President Sara Duterte clarified on April 9, 2026, that her political camp has not yet finalized or announced an official Senate slate for the 2028 elections. During an ambush interview in Davao ...

item.title: Western Sydney Wanderers and Sydney FC: Cartoonist Highlights Derby Rivalry
item.description: In his latest cartoon, David Squires highlights the fierce rivalry between Western Sydney Wanderers and Sydney FC, focusing on recent managerial changes that have added tension to the Sydney derby. Th...

item.title: Michelin Guide Adds Pittsburgh’s Cheetah Lounge to Great Lakes Restaurant Listings
item.description: The Michelin Guide recently acknowledged several top restaurants from the Great Lakes region, including the well-known Cheetah Lounge in Pittsburgh. This recognition highlights the city's growing culi...

item.title: Cardi B and Ex Seen Together at Her Concert Amid Co-Parenting
item.description: American rapper Cardi B has been having a busy and successful Little Miss Drama tour with sold-out shows across the US. Recently, her alleged ex, Stefon Diggs, was spotted attending one of her concert...

item.title: Trump Criticizes NATO, Hungary Faces EU Scrutiny Ahead of Elections
item.description: US President Donald Trump has renewed his criticism of NATO, calling it 'very disappointing' on social media shortly after meeting with NATO Secretary General Mark Rutte. Trump reportedly demanded tha...

item.title: Cannes Festival Emphasises Global Auteur Cinema Over Hollywood
item.description: The 79th Cannes Film Festival has announced a lineup that prioritises world cinema auteurs over Hollywood productions. Iconic directors such as Pedro Almodóvar, Cristian Mungiu, and Asghar Farhadi hea...

item.title: High Court extends protection for Nairobi Hospital board amid multi-agency investigations
item.description: The High Court has prolonged interim orders preventing government-appointed multi-agency teams from arresting or probing the board of directors at Nairobi Hospital. Despite objections from the Directo...

item.title: Kruger Park: Why Exiting Your Vehicle Can Lead to Danger
item.description: A recent incident in the Kruger National Park has highlighted the dangers of disregarding park rules, particularly the risk of exiting one's vehicle during animal sightings. A tourist was fined R2,500...

item.title: Top Rope Wrestling to Host Major Event at Blackpool Winter Gardens
item.description: Blackpool’s Winter Gardens is set to host a thrilling pro-wrestling event this April, featuring a high-energy 6-man tag team match. The event, titled 'Top Rope Wrestling - Rascal Mania,' will take pla...

item.title: FG Concerned Over Spread of CBPP Affecting Cattle in 17 States
item.description: The Federal Government don raise alarm say contagious bovine pleuropneumonia (CBPP), wey be serious cattle disease, don affect 17 states for Nigeria with 131 outbreaks confirmed. Minister of Livestock...

item.title: Uttarakhand Police Arrest Two Arms Smugglers Linked to Al-Badr Network
item.description: On Thursday, Uttarakhand Police arrested two interstate arms smugglers in Udham Singh Nagar, allegedly connected to the Pakistan-based terrorist organisation Al-Badr. The accused, identified as Harend...

item.title: Fake maple syrup scandal expands as cans with hidden labels surface
item.description: A growing scandal in Quebec involves fake maple syrup being sold in stores, with some cans found featuring a sticker concealing the name of the implicated company, Steve Bourdeau’s 9227-8712 Québec In...

item.title: Punjab Assembly committee receives bill to raise Christian marriage age to 18 and update colonial-era law
item.description: A private member bill titled the Christian Marriage Act Bill 2026 has been submitted to the Standing Committee on Minority Affairs of the Punjab Assembly. The bill aims to modernise the outdated Chris...

item.title: Meta's AI App Rises to No. 5 on the App Store Following Muse Spark Launch
item.description: Meta's AI app saw a massive surge in installs after the launch of its new AI model, Muse Spark, which marked a significant step forward for the company's AI efforts. Developed under Alexandr Wang, hea...

item.title: Barcelona files formal complaint to UEFA about missed handball call
item.description: On Thursday, Barcelona don submit complaint to UEFA over one handball matter wey referee no review during their 2-0 first leg Champions League quarter-final loss against Atletico Madrid. The club talk...

item.title: Tshwane CFO Gareth Mnisi scheduled to appear before Madlanga commission over tender irregularities
item.description: Gareth Mnisi, the Chief Financial Officer of Tshwane, is set to appear before the Madlanga commission of inquiry on Friday next week, following a preliminary attendance on Thursday to reschedule his s...
